steps.title: Set up the quadratic equation
steps.content:
The area of a rectangle equals width times length. With width $n$ and length $n+6$:
$$n(n+6) = 280$$
Expand and rearrange to standard form:
$$n^2 + 6n - 280 = 0$$

steps.title: Factor and solve
steps.content:
To factor $n^2 + 6n - 280 = 0$, we need two numbers that multiply to $-280$ and add to $6$.

Factor pairs of 280: we know $280 = 14 \times 20$. If we use the pair $(20, -14)$: we get $20 \times (-14) = -280$ and $20 + (-14) = 6$.
$$(n+20)(n-14) = 0$$
Solutions: $n = -20$ or $n = 14$. Since $n$ represents the width of a rectangle, it must be positive. Therefore, $n = 14$.
